subcodes.title: Words to the friends, spoken around 1909-02-20
subcodes.first_line: The world of existence holds the station of one temple, one body; and man in comparison thereto is the spirit of such body.
subcodes.subjects: @man is the sum; pinnacle; fruit of creation, @unity; oneness of humanity, @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life
